# Zoox - Senior/Staff Software Engineer - Operational Tools

- Retrieved on: `2026-03-27`
- Source type: live public posting snapshot
- Source URL: `https://jobs.lever.co/zoox/b6799ed0-252b-4535-a908-af77eb130415`
- Work mode: `Hybrid`
- Locations: `Foster City, CA / Seattle, WA / San Diego, CA`

## Snapshot Summary
Zoox describes this as a senior or staff-level software engineering role focused on operational tools for autonomous vehicle operations. The posting emphasizes full-stack ownership, real-time monitoring systems, automation, live support tooling, and cross-functional work with product, design, and remote operators.

## Technical Signals Captured
- JavaScript / TypeScript
- Node.js
- HTML / CSS
- React or similar frontend framework
- large-scale full-stack system design
- 3D graphics or spatial reasoning as a bonus

## Compensation Signals Captured
- Base range listed in the public posting: `$210,000 - $305,000`
- Posting also references Amazon RSUs, Zoox Stock Appreciation Rights, and possible sign-on bonus

## Why This Fixture Exists
This posting gives the desktop proof suite a high-signal operational tooling role that is close to workflow-heavy product software and premium enterprise desktop expectations.
